title: E2E Test System Design
summary: Technical design for a two-tier Ginkgo/Gomega E2E test system covering CLI/API and Docker-mode server lifecycle.
notes: No frontmatter type field; 'Status: Approved' and Problem/Design structure resemble ADR but lack Decision/Consequences sections. Content is dominated by concrete implementation contracts (file layout, helper signatures, Taskfile tasks, test coverage tables), so classified as SPEC over DOC/ADR.
